$comment: The craft element catalog. status: proven=generalized & registry-ready | todo=shipped on a source site, needs generalizing | superseded | parked. recipe paths are in craft-lab/recipes/. Harvest one brick at a time (see README).

elements.name: cinematic-scroll-saga
elements.summary: One pinned stage: a 2.5D scene-reel that flows into a guided map tour and closes on a photo. Hard-swap beats (no cross-fade), weighted-timeline pacing.
elements.note: Freshly proven 2026-06-19. FIRST harvest. Generalize: strip Hinglaj specifics into props; reuse lib/timeline.

elements.name: preloader-gateway
elements.summary: Cinematic entry: doors/curtain slide open on scroll or load to reveal the sanctum behind.

elements.name: horizontal-scroll
elements.summary: Pinned horizontal scroll-painting / lookbook driven by vertical scroll.
assetSlots: panels[] or one wide cloth image

elements.name: scene-reel-2.5d
elements.note: Folded into cinematic-scroll-saga. Keep as a lighter standalone option if needed.

elements.name: cylinder-carousel
elements.summary: 3D cylindrical carousel — panels on a virtual cylinder, rotates with scroll.
elements.note: Built as a demo, not adopted. Good for a browse/collection view.

elements.name: r3f-3d-hero
elements.summary: React-Three-Fiber 3D hero object with mouse-driven camera (e.g. neural core / orbital rings).

elements.name: material-shader
elements.summary: Custom GLSL material — oxidised-silver / liquid-glass / refraction+bloom.

elements.name: custom-cursor
elements.summary: Branded custom cursor with hover states.

elements.name: hover-image-distortion
elements.summary: WebGL hover distortion / displacement on images.

elements.name: page-transition-morph
elements.summary: Route transitions with shared-element morph between pages.

elements.name: entrance-choreography
elements.summary: Staggered hero entrance with easing comparator (the Essential-tier reveal).

elements.name: smooth-scroll
elements.summary: Lenis smooth-scroll provider (foundation many elements assume).

elements.name: microinteractions
elements.summary: Hover depth, magnetic buttons, small reveal/pop pieces.
elements.note: Overlaps the existing `motion` skill — keep as a reference recipe, not a heavy element.
